app.name: EstateAbly
app.tagline: The digital factbook for real estate

auth.reset_help: Enter your account email. We will send you a reset link.
auth.reset_sent_body: If an account exists for this email, a reset link is on its way. Check your spam folder too.
auth.verify_sent_body: We have sent you a confirmation link. Click it to activate your account.
auth.password_too_short: Password must be at least 6 characters.

invite.title: Accept invitation
invite.joining: You were invited to join workspace "{workspace}" as {role}.
invite.login_required: Please sign in first to accept the invitation.
invite.invalid_or_used: This invitation is invalid or has already been used.

settings.title: Settings
settings.tax_rate_help: Applied flat to the tax effect in the cashflow calculation.
settings.default_depreciation_help: Used for properties without their own rate.
settings.tenant_score_help: Each factor is multiplied by its weight. All equal (= 1) yields the classic average. Weight 0 excludes a factor.
settings.weights_all_zero: At least one factor must have a weight > 0.
settings.cashflow_convention_help: Controls how income and Hausgeld are labelled in the cashflow tool. Economically identical — labelling only.
settings.default_management_help: Default management cost per unit. Overridable per property or per snapshot.
settings.bank_maintenance_help: Conservative maintenance allowance (typically 7–12 €/m²) — bank view only, on top of the reserve.

owners.title: Owners
owners.name: Name
owners.kind_person_help: A single individual. First and last name are captured separately.
owners.kind_group_help: An ownership community (e.g. spouses) — members are linked after saving.
owners.no_members: No members yet. Add persons below.
owners.no_more_persons: All existing persons are already members. Create more persons first.

properties.title: Properties
properties.parent_property_help: If this unit is part of a house, select the house here — otherwise leave empty.
properties.funding_cost_help: Informational — deductible expense, not part of acquisition cost or cashflow calculation.
properties.value_split_help: Land + building must total 100 % / the purchase price.
properties.owners_share_help: Sum of all shares must equal exactly 100 %.
properties.owners_no_owners: No owners in this workspace yet. Create owners first.
properties.owners_duplicate: An owner can only be assigned once.

loans.title: Loans
loans.first_rate_note: Interest & principal shift every month — interest decreases, principal grows. Initial values:

valuation.title: Valuation
valuation.no_sqm_warning: Living area missing — multiplier value cannot be calculated.
valuation.no_land_value_warning: Land value missing — reproduction cost incomplete.
valuation.method_footnote: Methodology: (a) GRM value = sqm × market rent €/m² × 12 × multiplier (the quick rule of thumb used by brokers and banks). (b) Reproduction cost new = land value + building value (simplified, without age deduction). (c) Market value = weighted average of both. Indication for internal use (e.g. bank conversations) — not a certified appraisal.
valuation.weighting_help: Share of GRM vs. reproduction cost in the combined market value.
valuation.help_market_rent: Local comparison rent €/m² (rent index, listing comparison, expert estimate) — NOT the actually-collected rent.
valuation.help_multiple: Gross rent multiplier: market value ≈ multiplier × annual gross cold rent. Typical range 18–30, depending on location and condition. Rule of thumb of the broker market — not a net-yield factor in the ImmoWertV sense.
valuation.help_building_value: Reproduction cost of the building (replacement-cost-new, simplified). For more precision: standard construction cost × gross area × indexing, before age deduction.
valuation.source_footnote: This app delivers a market value indication based on GRM and reproduction cost new. Not an ImmoWertV-conformant appraisal, not an official valuation report — for bank/tax purposes consider adding a certified expert appraisal.

pnl.hausgeld_mode_help: You can either capture Hausgeld as a single total or split it into recoverable (heating, water, waste, …) and non-recoverable (management, insurance, …) — not both. The split matters only for tax reporting; the cashflow saldo is identical either way.
pnl.hausgeld_total_help: Full Hausgeld including recoverable parts — the reserve goes separately below.
pnl.projection_help: Projection based on the latest cashflow entry: same rent, Hausgeld and reserve over the years — interest/principal shift per the amortization schedule, depreciation follows the chosen method. Investor takeaway: the tax effect erodes over time as the interest share declines.
pnl.tax_section_help: Depreciation and the tax effect are not cashflow items in the strict sense — depreciation is non-cash, the tax effect is the actual tax you owe. Principal and reserve are part of the cashflow above but do NOT reduce the tax base.
pnl.view_investor_help: With personal tax effect — your own yield calculation.
pnl.view_bank_help: Pre-tax with vacancy reserve, conservative maintenance allowance and management — how a bank underwrites.
pnl.convention_hint_net: Default: cold rent only as income; the recoverable share passes through.
pnl.convention_hint_gross: Cold rent plus recoverable HG counts as income; the full HG goes to the expense side.
pnl.vacancy_amount_help: Empty = settings default × cold rent (e.g. 2 % residential, 4 % commercial).
pnl.management_costs_help: External or imputed management. Empty = settings default.
pnl.bank_maintenance_help: Conservative per-m² allowance — additional to the reserve, bank view only.
pnl.kpi_ltv_help: Remaining loans ÷ current market value (latest valuation).
pnl.stress_label: Stress test (+250 bp after rate lock)
pnl.stress_help: Increases interest by 250 bp once the rate lock ends — typical bank worst-case.
pnl.stress_no_lock: No rate lock end date set — stress applies from period start.
pnl.title: Cashflow
pnl.section_inputs: Inputs — leave override fields blank to let the app compute the value automatically from loans / depreciation.
pnl.duplicate_period: An entry for this period already exists. Edit it or adjust the period.
pnl.hausgeld_sum_invalid: Recoverable + non-recoverable ancillary costs must equal the total.

afa.title: Depreciation
afa.method_linear_help: Same amount each year = basis × rate. Default for existing buildings; typical rate 2 %.
afa.method_degressive_7v_help: Only for new residential buildings with construction start between 01.10.2023 and 30.09.2029. 5 % p.a. on the remaining book value.
afa.method_sonder_7b_help: Special depreciation for eligible new rental housing: extra 5 % p.a. in the first 4 years on top of straight-line (typically 3 %).
afa.start_year_help: Year in which year 1 of the depreciation runs. Empty = derived from transfer date.
afa.sonder_basis_limit_help: Optional cap on the § 7b basis (subsidy ceiling). Empty = full depreciation basis.
afa.schedule_footnote: Modelling only — not a tax ruling. § 7b is simplified (eligibility not enforced).
afa.no_basis: No basis (purchase price and building share / land value missing)
afa.basis_from_ancillary: Building share of ancillary acquisition costs
afa.basis_footnote: Per § 7 EStG, ancillary acquisition costs (real-estate transfer tax, broker, notary, land registry) are split between building and land in the same ratio as the purchase price. Only the building share is depreciable. Funding costs are immediately deductible (Werbungskosten, § 9 EStG) and not capitalised.

investments.title: Investments
investments.type_fixed_common_reserve: Fixed measure on common property — from reserve
investments.type_fixed_common_levy: Fixed measure on common property — special levy
investments.type_optional_common_reserve: Optional measure on common property — from reserve
investments.type_optional_common_levy: Optional measure on common property — special levy

portfolio.title: Portfolio
portfolio.no_transfer_dates: No transfer dates ("Übergang Nutzen & Lasten") recorded yet.
portfolio.balance_chart_title: Purchase price · remaining debt · equity per property
portfolio.weighted_note: Values weighted by ownership share. Properties without owner at end.

errors.invalid_percent: Invalid percent value: "{value}". Please enter a number (e.g. "2.5").
